title: Knysna to host LFA regional play-offs
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Local Football...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Local Football Association will be staging the Regional Inter Local Football Association (LFA) play-offs from Friday 29 August up until Sunday afternoon.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Local Football Association will be staging the Regional Inter Local Football Association (LFA) play-offs from Friday 29 August up until Sunday afternoon."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The play-offs games will be played at various venues in Knysna over the weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The regional LFA Promotional League's winners will be fighting for the top two spot to secure a place in the Safa Eden Regional League for the upcoming 2025/26 season.","html":"The regional LFA Promotional League's winners will be fighting for the top two spot to secure a place in the Safa Eden Regional League for the upcoming 2025/26 season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The games will be played in a points format and the top two clubs with better points will move up to the next level in the elite league.","html":"The games will be played in a points format and the top two clubs with better points will move up to the next level in the elite league."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"LFA Regional","html":"LFA Regional"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"League winners","html":"League winners"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Strikers Football Club -","html":"Strikers Football Club -"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plettenberg Bay","html":"Plettenberg Bay"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KLFA - Knysna/not confirmed","html":"KLFA - Knysna/not confirmed"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Paris United FC - George","html":"Paris United FC - George"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Flying Eagles - Mossel Bay","html":"Flying Eagles - Mossel Bay"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"X1 Attackers FC - Hessequa","html":"X1 Attackers FC - Hessequa"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Flying Birds FC - Kannaland","html":"Flying Birds FC - Kannaland"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"De Rust United FC - Oudts-","html":"De Rust United FC - Oudts-"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"hoorn","html":"hoorn"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
